data.body: Starting gate-calibration analysis (plan-review, code-review, completion-verifier): mining activity since each gate's last calibration to assess friction (plan-review PASS->BLOCK flips on novel late findings; completion-verifier FAILs on operator-attested ACs the agent could satisfy; code-review BLOCK threshold appropriateness). Deliverable: calibration assessment + recommended threshold/posture adjustments preserving 4-pass separation of concerns.
